response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with 13+ years of software development across multiple stacks, but the role requires a people manager with at least 2 years of formal people management and 3 years in a technical leadership role. The resume shows no explicit people-management experience, no team headcount ownership, no performance review or 1:1 cadence experience, and no developer-tools/build-systems/test-infrastructure background at scale. Mobile-platform ecosystem experience is also thin (some iOS/Apple TV work in 2015-2016).
strengths: 13+ years of broad full-stack engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and backend
Strong testing and developer-enablement mindset: TDD, CI/CD, custom test runner (Trial), Fluent-Asserts, Selenium course authoring, refactoring dojos
Demonstrated technical mentoring through workshops, talks, and course creation (Web Internals, TDT, Cluj IT Cluster)
concerns: No explicit people-management experience: no direct reports, 1:1s, performance reviews, or team leadership title in any role
Limited developer-tools/build-systems/test-infrastructure experience at the scale implied (compilers, automated releases, large internal platforms)
Minimal recent mobile-platform ecosystem exposure; mobile work is ~10 years old and not at platform scale

key_factors.factor: Senior IC depth with strong testing/tooling instincts
Weak fit on mobile-platform and dev-tools-at-scale requirements
